name: Slow-Cooked Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 16 oz cans kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the ground beef and drain any excess fat.
2. Transfer the browned beef to a slow cooker.
3. Add kidney beans, diced tomatoes (with juice), tomato sauce, chopped onions, green pepper, garlic, chili powder, salt (if using), and pepper to the slow cooker.
4. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours or on high for 4 hours.
5. Serve individual servings with shredded cheddar cheese if desired.
